name: Avon Product
description: The Rare Pearls Deodorant Stick from the Skin So Soft Pure Nature collection offers long-lasting odor protection and is made with naturally derived, vegan, and cruelty-free ingredients.

name: Avon
description: Avon offers the Far Away Roll-On Antiperspirant Deodorant, designed to keep sweat marks at bay and provide lasting freshness.

name: Glossier Inc.
description: Glossier offers an aluminum-free deodorant designed for effective odor defense, promoting fresh underarms and pit care. Their commitment to accessible and uncomplicated beauty extends to their deodorant product line.

name: Avon Products
description: Avon offers the Intense No-Gas Deo Perfume for Him, which is designed for everyday use, providing a strong and lasting fragrance with up to 1200 sprays. This product reflects the company's commitment to innovative and trend-driven personal care items.

name: Inolex
description: Inolex is committed to innovating sustainable ingredient platforms, particularly in the beauty and personal care industry, which includes deodorants and antiperspirants. Their approach is rooted in green chemistry, highlighting their dedication to environmentally friendly practices.

name: Yanbal
description: Yanbal is a multinational cosmetics manufacturer that offers a variety of high-quality beauty products, including fragranced deodorants. With a focus on innovation and a strong presence in 11 countries, the company is dedicated to meeting the latest trends in beauty and wellness.

name: Birchbox
description: Birchbox offers a Deodorant Starter Kit, emphasizing their commitment to providing effective and easy-to-use beauty products that align with their community's values. Their subscription service allows users to discover a variety of products that suit their needs.

name: Clariant Chemicals
description: Clariant is a prominent manufacturer of specialty chemicals that provides innovative solutions for personal care, including deodorants. They offer CareMag™ D, which utilizes Dead Sea magnesium to enhance natural body odor control, supporting the growing demand for aluminum-free products.

name: Dollar Shave Club
description: The company offers a range of antiperspirants that provide all-day protection against wetness and odor, featuring a light, clean scent and a clump-free formula.

name: Lume Deodorant
description: Lume offers a Whole Body Deodorant designed to provide 72-hour odor protection, making it effective for more than just armpits. Their hypoallergenic and baking soda-free formulas are safe for sensitive skin, giving users the confidence to stay fresh throughout the day.
